languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

languages.text: "Мой дражайший коллега невероятно польщен вниманием. Прошу, спрашивайте".
"My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."
languages.original_text: "Мой дражайший коллега невероятно польщен вниманием. Прошу, спрашивайте".

traits.locale_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."
"My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."
"My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

languages.text: «Mi querido colega se siente extremadamente halagado por su atención. Por favor, pregunte».
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

traits.locale_text: «Mi querido colega se siente extremadamente halagado por su atención. Por favor, pregunte».

languages.text: “我最亲爱的同僚对这份关注深感荣幸。请提问吧。”
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

traits.locale_text: “我最亲爱的同僚对这份关注深感荣幸。请提问吧。”

languages.text: « Mon cher collègue est incroyablement flatté par votre attention. Posez vos questions, je vous en prie. »
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

traits.locale_text: « Mon cher collègue est incroyablement flatté par votre attention. Posez vos questions, je vous en prie. »

languages.text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege fühlt sich angesichts der Aufmerksamkeit sehr geschmeichelt. Bitte stellt Eure Fragen."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

traits.locale_text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege fühlt sich angesichts der Aufmerksamkeit sehr geschmeichelt. Bitte stellt Eure Fragen."

languages.text: "私の親愛なる同僚は、注目されることに大変光栄に思っています。質問をどうぞ。
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, gördüğü ilgiden son derece gurur duyuyor. Lütfen sorularınızı sorun."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague is incredibly flattered by the attention. Please ask your questions."

traits.locale_text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, gördüğü ilgiden son derece gurur duyuyor. Lütfen sorularınızı sorun."
